Before you continue

D Health is an AI-powered health assistant — not a medical service.

By continuing, you understand and agree that:

  1. Not medical advice. D Health uses artificial intelligence to organize your health data and generate general insights. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment, and is not a medical device.
  2. AI can be wrong. Insights are generated by AI and may be incomplete or inaccurate. Never rely on them for medical decisions.
  3. Always consult a professional. Always seek the advice of a qualified doctor for any medical question or condition. Never ignore or delay professional advice because of something in this app.
  4. Emergencies. In an emergency, call your local emergency number immediately — D Health is not for emergency use.
  5. No liability. D Health and JH Group accept no responsibility or liability for any decision, action, or outcome based on your use of the app.
I have read, understood and accept the above, including the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

❓ FAQ
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes, cancel anytime from your account settings. No hidden fees.
Is my health data secure?
All data is encrypted end-to-end. GDPR compliant. We never sell your data.
Is there a free trial?
Yes! Premium comes with a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
🔒 Secure payment · GDPR compliant · Cancel anytime
